sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42596" key="*(erma/noubis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἑρμάνουβις</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἕρμ-ης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, Graecized form of Anubis, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.375e</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:3:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.11</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.360</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
